key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: Mid-cycle operating income proxy $130.2M ÷ 67.262M shares; FY2025 OCF $10.325M (trough working-capital year) per ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm
Mid-cycle wet clean share gains; deferred revenue converts; exit 8× owner cash

open_questions: Confirm backlog milestone band (**$0–$18/sh**) versus deferred revenue already in normalized owner cash.
Review related-party and China structure for management alignment gate.
thesis: ACM Research, Inc. (ACMR) designs and sells wet cleaning, electroplating, and advanced packaging equipment to semiconductor fabs, with a large China manufacturing and customer base. **[Fact]** Shares trade on Nasdaq (ACMR). **[Fact]** FY2025 consolidated revenue was **$901.3 million**, operating income **$109.4 million**, and net income attributable to common shareholders **$94.1 million** (diluted earnings **$1.37** per share) per `ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm`. **[Fact]** FY2025 cash and equivalents were **$757.4 million** against total debt of **$214.0 million**; operating cash flow was only **$10.3 million** after a heavy working-capital build, down from **$152.5 million** in FY2024.
why_market_wrong: The stock may trade as a secular advanced-packaging winner while near-term cash conversion and margin mix tell a cyclical equipment story. **[Inference]** Revenue grew **15%** year over year to **$901 million**, yet operating income fell **28%** as costs and working capital absorbed growth. **[Inference]** Deferred revenue of **$252 million** at year-end signals a large backlog, but FY2025 operating cash flow of **$10 million** shows the market may overestimate how quickly that backlog converts to distributable owner cash. **[Inference]** Proof-first component math at base case sums to about **$23** per share of filing-locked economic value versus a price near **$83**, suggesting the market prices advanced packaging share gains and semicap recovery beyond what the conservative component schedule captures today.
